notes: v1.14.78 - Backup schema-version guardrail (roadmap P1): the full backup is now stamped with schemaVersion (PHANTOM_BACKUP_SCHEMA=1), and restore REFUSES a newer-schema bundle before any destructive write (the restore clears the Ghost Echo DB + overwrites localStorage) - preventing a wipe-then-partial-restore from a bundle an older app can't fully understand. Older/missing schema is allowed best-effort with a warning in the restore confirm. Protects the v1.14.74/.77 portability now that backups move between techs/versions. Additive imports (quirk/Ghost-Echo merges) are non-destructive and unchanged.
